case_title: ANDY BRYANT et al VS. HOLLY BENADUM

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,425.00 FILED BY BRYANT, ANDY DYKES, KELSEY AS TO DEFENDANT BENADUM, HOLLY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-14-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00). SERVED DEC-05-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BENADUM, HOLLY
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED APR-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-14-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BRYANT, ANDY DYKES, KELSEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BENADUM, HOLLY $2,380.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,430.00, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT FOR THE FULL AMOUNT OF HER SHARE OF THE SECURITY DEPOSIT. COM: PAUL SLAVIT; CLERK M. SCHWARTZ-SCOTT; NOT REPORTED (506) EXHIBITS RETAINED BY PLAINTIFF .PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
